10// This implements support adapting raw_ostream to std::ostream.

14#include "llvm/Support/raw_os_ostream.h"
15#include <ostream>
16using namespace llvm;

18//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
19// raw_os_ostream

21
22raw_os_ostream::~raw_os_ostream() {
23 flush();
24}
25
26void raw_os_ostream::write_impl(const char *Ptr, size_t Size) {
27 OS.write(Ptr, Size);
28}
29
30uint64_t raw_os_ostream::current_pos() const { return OS.tellp(); }
